channel.title: NPR Topics: National
channel.description: NPR coverage of national news, U.S. politics, elections, business, arts, culture, health and science, and technology. Subscribe to the NPR Nation RSS feed.
channel.copyright: Copyright 2024 NPR - For Personal Use Only

item.title: Why Trump's efforts to force Iran to concede to U.S. demands aren't working
item.description: The Virginia Supreme Court has delivered a striking blow to Democrats in the redistricting battle they're waging against Republicans.
item.content:encoded: The Virginia Supreme Court has delivered a striking blow to Democrats in the redistricting battle they're waging against Republicans.
item.dc:creator: Jackie Northam

item.title: A young mom at her wits' end tossed out her dirty dishes. Then they turned up clean
item.description: A young mother felt overwhelmed raising her three kids alone. Unable to face a sink full of dirty dishes, she threw them out. A neighbor returned them, washed and shiny, along with a message of hope.
item.content:encoded: A young mother felt overwhelmed raising her three kids alone. Unable to face a sink full of dirty dishes, she threw them out. A neighbor returned them, washed and shiny, along with a message of hope.
item.dc:creator: Jordan-Marie Smith

item.title: UFO files spanning decades are released by Defense Department
item.description: Cold War reports of mysterious rotating saucers; recent sightings of metallic elliptical objects floating in mid-air. Those and other reports of unidentified anomalous phenomena or UAPs — the military's term for UFOs — are described in documents released Friday.
item.content:encoded:
Cold War reports of mysterious rotating saucers; recent sightings of metallic elliptical objects floating in mid-air. Those and other reports of unidentified anomalous phenomena or UAPs — the military's term for UFOs — are described in documents released Friday.

(Image credit: NASA)
item.dc:creator: Bill Chappell

item.title: Canvas is back online, but questions — and final exam disruptions — linger
item.description: Some schools are warning users not to log back into Canvas yet, after a ransomware group claimed credit for a data breach. Half of North America's higher education institutions use the platform.
item.content:encoded:
Some schools are warning users not to log back into Canvas yet, after a ransomware group claimed credit for a data breach. Half of North America's higher education institutions use the platform.

(Image credit: Michael Warren)
item.dc:creator: Rachel Treisman

item.title: Court rejects Virginia redistricting in a blow to Democrats' counter to Trump, GOP
item.description: Virginia voters approved redistricting that could help Democrats pick up four House seats. Democrats said it was to counter the gains that Trump and the GOP have picked up in Republican-led states.
item.content:encoded:
Virginia voters approved redistricting that could help Democrats pick up four House seats. Democrats said it was to counter the gains that Trump and the GOP have picked up in Republican-led states.

(Image credit: Julia Demaree Nikhinson)
item.dc:creator: Larry Kaplow

item.title: The U.S. fires on Iranian tankers trying to evade its blockade amid a Hormuz standoff
item.description: U.S. forces fired on two Iranian oil tankers after exchanging fire with Iranian forces in the Strait of Hormuz. And the United Arab Emirates reported another Iranian missile and drone attack.
item.content:encoded:
U.S. forces fired on two Iranian oil tankers after exchanging fire with Iranian forces in the Strait of Hormuz. And the United Arab Emirates reported another Iranian missile and drone attack.

(Image credit: Amirhossein Khorgooei)
item.dc:creator: The Associated Press

item.title: What video got Kash Patel in the headlines this week? The quiz knows
item.description: Plus: The Met Gala, GameStop, Canada and Banksy (again!).
item.content:encoded: Plus: The Met Gala, GameStop, Canada and Banksy (again!).
item.dc:creator: Holly J. Morris

item.title: Fallout from the Iran war may include a NATO where the U.S. is no longer its leader
item.description: President Trump's decision to leave NATO in the dark before launching strikes on Iran has inflamed tensions and is putting new urgency on rethinking the alliance.
item.content:encoded:
President Trump's decision to leave NATO in the dark before launching strikes on Iran has inflamed tensions and is putting new urgency on rethinking the alliance.

(Image credit: Joern Pollex)
item.dc:creator: Scott Neuman

item.title: With Spirit in liquidation, here's what happens next to its planes
item.description: When Spirit Airlines stopped flying last weekend, it left more than 90 planes scattered across the country. Many will go back to the companies that own them, while Spirit tries to monetize the rest.
item.content:encoded:
When Spirit Airlines stopped flying last weekend, it left more than 90 planes scattered across the country. Many will go back to the companies that own them, while Spirit tries to monetize the rest.

(Image credit: Giorgio Viera)
item.dc:creator: Joel Rose

item.title: Experts warn Trump's plan to paint federal building could cause permanent damage
item.description: President Trump wants to paint the Eisenhower Executive Office Building white, but experts and preservationists are pushing back, warning it could permanently damage the historic granite.
item.content:encoded: President Trump wants to paint the Eisenhower Executive Office Building white, but experts and preservationists are pushing back, warning it could permanently damage the historic granite.
item.dc:creator: Neda Ulaby
